title: Is Summary of a Formula sub-column broken?
excerpt: In the attached image, “[Σa Write-Off]” is a summary of the formula sub-column “SC_Write-Off”. The value should be $4,463. As you see, it is 10,000x would it should be. Any ideas what’s going wrong?

posts.author: jscottsmith (Scott Smith)
posts.cookedHtml:
mon1279×637 76.3 KB

In the attached image, “[Σa Write-Off]” is a summary of the formula sub-column “SC_Write-Off”. The value should be $4,463. As you see, it is 10,000x would it should be. Any ideas what’s going wrong?

posts.author: BiancaT (Bianca Taylor)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hey Scott!

In order for us to troubleshoot the issue, we might need you to click into the formula cell to see the formula and which columns are included in it - is it possible to do this?
